welcome.subTagline: Talk to your AI teacher, have fun, and learn.
welcome.terms: By continuing you accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
welcome.appleComingSoon: Sign in with Apple coming soon.
welcome.anonymousDisabledMessage: Anonymous sign-ins are disabled for this project. Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Sign In/Up → enable "Allow anonymous sign-ins".

signUp.appleHint: You can continue with email. Sign in with Apple coming soon.
signUp.missingInfoBody: Email and a password of at least 6 characters are required.

language.title: Which language do you want to learn?
language.hint: You can change this any time.

accent.title: Which accent do you prefer?
accent.hint: Your tutor will speak with this accent and use accent-specific words.

placement.loadFailedBodyGeneric: Trouble loading questions. Check your connection.

result.dailyPathHint: I've prepared a personalized {{minutes}}-minute daily path for you.
result.offlineNotice: (Offline scoring — AI scoring will kick in once backend is connected.)

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Keep the streak going with a quick workout.

tutorTab.title: AI Tutor
tutorTab.subtitle: Pick a mode and start talking now.

voice.title: Voice chat
voice.desc: Talk to a real-time AI tutor

accentCard.title: Pick your accent
accentCard.subtitle: American · British · Scottish · Australian — your tutor speaks and corrects in that accent.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: This week's global ranking · Top 100 + your rank

lesson.stubBody: This screen will soon be filled with interactive exercises, pronunciation scoring, and XP rewards.

voiceTutor.stubBody:
ElevenLabs Conversational AI is coming soon.
A Pixar-style 3D avatar from Meshy is on the way.

chatTutor.needLanguageBody: You need a language and level to chat with the AI tutor.
chatTutor.introHelp: Let's practice {{langName}} today. How can I help you at the {{level}} level?

errors.rateLimit: You're typing too fast — wait a moment.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired — please reopen the app.

appLanguage.title: Choose your app language
appLanguage.subtitle: You can change this any time from Settings.
